settings.title: Wildstyle Gallery
settings.subtitle: A contemporary art space in Gothenburg dedicated to graffiti and street art culture. We showcase rotating exhibitions from leading artists pushing the boundaries of the medium.
settings.block_1_text: Wildstyle Gallery is a contemporary art space in Gothenburg dedicated to showcasing graffiti and street art in a gallery setting. Our space features rotating exhibitions from both established and emerging artists, offering a platform where urban art meets fine art presentation.
settings.block_2_text: We host solo and group exhibitions throughout the year, each carefully curated to highlight the depth and diversity of contemporary graffiti art. From large-scale canvases to limited edition prints, every show brings something new to discover.
